question: 1) What are the two revelations that God gives? Among them, write 2) which one is the one that the servants of God must receive at the time of Revelation's fulfillment and write 3) the process of how this revelation is delivered.
correct: Vision revelation, fulfillment revelation
Fulfillment revelation
God, Jesus, Angel, New John, Servants

question: Write 1) what "must soon take place" in Rv 1:1. 2) Who are "the servants" who receive the revealed Word?
correct: The events of the entire Book of Revelation - the physical fulfillment
The 14400 and the multitude in white of the 12 Tribes in Rv 7

question: Who is 1) "the one who reads", who are 2) "those who hear it", and who are 3) "those who take to heart what is written in it" in Rv 1:3? Include a relevant chapter (verse) in Rv.
correct: New John who received and ate the open book, Rv 10
Peoples, nations, languages, and kings, Rv 10:11

question: 1) Through whose appearance does the fulfillment of Rv begin? Include a reference. Regarding this event of Revelation beginning to be fulfilled, 2) when, and 3) where was the physical fulfillment?
correct: The appearance of the seven messengers, Rv 1:20
The Tabernacle Temple by Cheonggye Mountain in Gwacheon

question: Regarding the contents of the letters sent in Rv 2-3 1) How many kinds of content are there, and what are they? Write the 2) 3 figures that appear in order along with what they did.
correct: Three kinds: what you have seen, what is now, what will take place later

The seven messengers: the work of the lamb that prepares the way; the Nicolaitans: the food sacrificed to idols, teachings, sexual immorality; John: sent letters regarding repentance and the word of promise

question: Write 1) the blessings (12) the one who overcomes receives in Rv 2-3, with. 2) What is another blessing apart from the blessings promised in Rv 2-3. Include a reference verse in Revelation.
correct: Right to eat from the tree of life, Crown of life, Not be hurt at all by the second death, Hidden manna, White stone, Iron scepter, Morning star, White clothes, Written in the book of life, Pillar in God's temple, Write on him God's name, the name of the holy city, and Jesus' new name, Sit on Jesus' throne
Becomes the son who receives the inheritance, Rv 21:7

question: 1) What is the book of life in which Jesus promised to record the name of the One Who Overcomes, and 2) how many times does the book of life appear in Revelation? Include a reference.
correct: The registry of heaven - the church registry of the Twelve Tribes of Shinchoenji where the One Who Overcomes is

question: 1) What does it mean to write God's name, the name of the holy city, the new Jerusalem, and Jesus' new name on the One Who Overcomes? 2) Who is the one who receives the blessings Jesus promised in Rv 2-3.
correct: God, the kingdom of heaven, and Jesus will come to the One Who Overcomes
The one who fights and overcomes Satan, the Nicolaitans

question: In Rv 4, 1) who is following a voice, 2) when is this happening, 3) whose voice is he following, 4) where is he going, and 5) what does he see?
correct: John
After sending the letters on Jesus' behalf in Rv 2-3
Jesus
Heaven, the spiritual realm
What he saw: God's throne and structure in the spiritual realm, the movement of the spirits moving like lightning. What he heard: God and his throne will come to this earth

question: It is written in Rv 4:8 that God and His throne will come to this earth. 1) Where of which chapter in Revelation does God's throne come to? 2) What is the physical fulfillment of that place?
correct: Mt. Zion where the 144000 of the Twelve Tribes in Rv 14 are

question: 1) What is the "book sealed with seven seals" in God's right hand in Rv 5, and 2) what is the content of the sealed book?

God's mystery to be fulfilled

God's kingdom, the Twelve Tribes of Shinchoenji in Rv 7

question: 1) What appears whenever the seals of the sealed book are broken in Rv 6, 2) who gave the judgment, 3) through whom, and 4) who received it? 5) Why did they receive judgment?
correct: The physical entities prophesied in Revelation
Jesus
The four living creatures
The chosen people of the tabernacle who betrayed

question: 1) Who are the subjects of the kingdom who are thrown outside into the darkness in Mt 8? And 2) Who are those who come from the east and the west to take their seats in the kingdom of heaven? Include relevant bible chapters respectively.

The harvested, sealed and recreated Twelve Tribes of Shinchoenji, Rv 7 (Rv 14)

correct: After the judgment of the sun, moon and stars of the former heaven in Rv 6
Harvested from the harvesting field
The Twelve Tribes of Shincheonji

question: 1) Why are the trumpets blown in Rv 8? 2) Write 2 reference chapters for each regarding the first to sixth trumpet sounds and the seventh trumpet. At this time, 3) who in what chapter are "those who are killed" and 4) who are those that kill?

First to sixth trumpet: Rv 8, Rv 9 / Seventh trumpet: Rv 11, 1 Cor 15

correct: The spirit and flesh belonging to the devil, the spirit and flesh belonging to God
The dragon's seven pastors
False prophets
False doctrines and laws

question: At the 1C 1) who received and ate the revelation of the Old Testament fulfillment and to whom was it testified to? At the 2C 2) who received and ate the New Testament fulfillment and to whom was it testified? Include key reference verses with each answer.
correct: Jesus, rebellious Israel, Eze 3, Mt 15:24

question: What does it mean when it says that John received and ate the opened book in Rv 10?
correct: He completely perceived and mastered the true meaning and the physical fulfillment of Revelation

question: Write 1) what happens when the seventh trumpet is sounded, and 2) what the mystery of the last trumpet is, along with the two reference verses.

question: Write 4 verses where the seventh trumpet appears in the Old and New Testament.

question: Write about the three wars in the Book of Revelation. 1) The 1st war, 2) the 2nd war, 3) the 3rd war, including the chapters, the opponents, and the outcome (victory or defeat).
correct: First war: Rv 13, the seven stars and the seven golden lampstands (defeated) - the pastor who is like a beast (victorious)
Second war: Rv 12, the organization of the prostitute (defeated) - the child born of the woman (victorious)
Third war: Rv 16, Babylon (defeated) - the Tabernacle of the Testimony (victorious)

question: What is 1) the blood of the lamb and 2) the word of testimony which is the weapon the child and his brothers fought against the group of the dragon with Rv 12:9-11, and what is 3) the condition for the kingdom of God and salvation to be established?

The Word of the testimony of Revelation's fulfillment

correct: The Tabernacle Temple

correct: The same Tabernacle Temple as Rv 2-3
